scripts.cypress:e2e: bun run build-storybook && start-server-and-test 'npx http-server storybook-static -p 9786 -c-1 --cors' http://localhost:9786/iframe.html 'ELECTRON_EXTRA_LAUNCH_ARGS="--disable-gpu --no-sandbox" CYPRESS_BASE_URL=http://localhost:9786 cypress run --e2e'
scripts.cypress:e2e:spec: bun run build-storybook && start-server-and-test 'npx http-server storybook-static -p 9786 -c-1 --cors' http://localhost:9786/iframe.html 'ELECTRON_EXTRA_LAUNCH_ARGS="--disable-gpu --no-sandbox" CYPRESS_BASE_URL=http://localhost:9786 cypress run --e2e --spec "${CYPRESS_SPEC:-cypress/e2e/ghostty-terminal.cy.ts}"'
scripts.cypress:e2e:connect: bun run build && cypress run --e2e --spec cypress/e2e/app-connect-flow.cy.ts
